keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Anguilla 0, Saint Martin 1. Axel Raga Rigobert (Saint Martin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by David Chevalier.
Goal!  Anguilla 0, Saint Martin 2. Stanley Segarel (Saint Martin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Wilfried Dalmat.
Kévin Zonzon (Saint Martin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Anguilla 0, Saint Martin 3. Axel Raga Rigobert (Saint Martin) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Wilfried Dalmat.
Goal!  Anguilla 0, Saint Martin 4. Axel Raga Rigobert (Saint Martin) right footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by David Chevalier.
Goal!  Anguilla 0, Saint Martin 5. Axel Raga Rigobert (Saint Martin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Malcom Babel.
Substitution, Anguilla. Delani Francis replaces Keante Brooks.
Substitution, Anguilla. Rasharn Mcdonald-Baptise replaces Jermal Richardson.
Second Half begins Anguilla 0, Saint Martin 5.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Sébastien Célina replaces Belony Dumas.
Delani Francis (Anguilla) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Kearney Chance replaces Wilfried Dalmat.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Yannick Bellechasse replaces Keelan Lebon.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Jérémy Peterson-Dutoya replaces Stanley Segarel.
Substitution, Anguilla. Defari Francis replaces Mekhi Conner because of an injury.
Goal!  Anguilla 0, Saint Martin 6. Romuald Lacazette (Saint Martin) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Yannick Bellechasse with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, Anguilla. Dalek Moore replaces Vershawn Hodge because of an injury.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Danilo Cocks replaces David Chevalier.
Rasharn Mcdonald-Baptise (Anguilla) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
